methodology_notes: Cribl synthesis of multiple 2025 CISO benchmark studies (incl. Team8 CISO Village). Public blog. NOTE: provides a deliberately BALANCING signal to the corpus — the consolidation and budget-growth narratives are more contested than single-source figures (e.g. Panorays/Gartner '75% will consolidate') suggest.

distributions.context: 52% of CISOs report a budget increase in 2025, down from 70% in 2024. ~Half report a flat budget; 43% report no change in technology spend YoY.
60% of CISOs prefer best-of-breed solutions over platform consolidation, despite megavendor consolidation messaging — a counterweight to the 'everyone is consolidating' narrative.
50% of CISOs say vendor consolidation is a top priority for the next year — coexisting with the best-of-breed preference above. (Contrast: Panorays/Gartner cite ~75% consolidating.)
70% of organizations now dedicate more than 10% of their security budget to AI-related investments; AI risk is the top 2025 security priority.
